creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
What is this commit intending to do?

The port is already staged:
http://www.freshports.org/commit.php?category=games&port=klondike&files=yes&message_id=201407091402.s69E2v3P015499@svn.freebsd.org


It's apparently building everywhere:
http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=games&portname=klondike



This patch looks quite similar to the one submitted in bug 190834 which had numerous problems, so I am quite skeptical.

So can you explain why you submitted this?  what's it trying to fix?
